name: COA-8506 COA-8513 COA-8514 Daily Plan item remove action can be cancelled
description: Long-presses the first Daily Practice item, verifies customization actions, opens the Remove from Daily Plan confirmation, cancels it, and verifies the item remains.
descriptionHtml: Long-presses the first Daily Practice item, verifies customization actions, opens the Remove from Daily Plan confirmation, cancels it, and verifies the item remains.
statusMessage: Current existing-progress Daily Plan state shows the core-exercise restriction instead of customization actions; COA-8506/8513/8514 need a fixture with a removable Daily Plan card.
